description: HR policies establishing employee responsibilities around security. Code of conduct, background checks, security awareness training, acceptable use policies.

subcriteria.name: code_of_conduct
subcriteria.reference_text: Code of conduct or acceptable use policy covering employee responsibilities, prohibited activities, and security expectations.

subcriteria.name: security_training
subcriteria.reference_text: Security awareness training program with completion tracking. Annual or recurring training requirement. Evidence that employees completed training.

subcriteria.name: background_checks
subcriteria.reference_text: Background check policy describing when checks are conducted. Pre-employment screening process.

subcriteria.name: acknowledgment
subcriteria.reference_text: Employee acknowledgment or signature confirming receipt and understanding of security policies.

mismatch_signals.reason: PTO/leave policy is not a security HR policy. CC1.4 wants code of conduct and security training.
Benefits document is not an HR security policy.
Job posting is not an HR security policy.
Training slides without completion records do not prove the training was completed.
